The '''Murachaun''' were [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptilians]] indigenous to [[Nahsu Minor]] in the [[Ktilac Regions/Legends|Ktilac Regions]].

==Biology and appearance==
The average Murachaun stood almost two meters or more in height, and was covered with scales that could be blue, burgundy, or red in coloration. They were herbivorous.<ref name="GatORW" />

==Society and culture==
The Murachaun developed a common culture and quasi-religion with the other two ruling species of the [[Ktilac Regions/Legends|Ktilac Regions]], the [[Tocoyan]]s and the [[Ktilac]] themselves. Each was seen as a complement to the other two, and regarded the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as unholy. Murachaun found in the galaxy at large were heretics outcast from the Ktilac Regions.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

As a people, the Murachaun were known to be hard-working, orderly, and outgoing.<ref name="GatORW" />

==History==
The Murachaun were natives of [[Nahsu Minor]], a world in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] near the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]]. They came into contact with the nearby worlds of [[Ktil/Legends|Ktil]] and [[Tocoya]], and the interaction with the natives of those worlds led the three to become the nucleus of a confederation known as the Ktilac Regions. The Ktilac, Tocoyans, and Murachaun each ruled sixty-three [[Star system/Legends|star systems]].<ref name="TEA" />

The Ktilac Regions became one of the [[Allied Region]]s of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], nominally ruled by a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]].<ref name="TEA" /> The Murachaun were first encountered by Old Republic scouts shortly before the onset of the Clone Wars and became one of the many races that were enslaved by the Empire. The Murachaun didn't submit to the Imperial presence on their homeworld, but rebelled against their oppressors in any covert way they could.<ref name="GatORW" />

Under the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]], the Ktilac Regions retained Allied Region status.<ref name="TEA" />

[[Kufra Ahara]] was a Murachaun.<ref name="GatORW" />

==Common Murachaun names==
*Earsulo Osso<ref name="GatORW" />
*Fajiri Feravi<ref name="GatORW" />
*Saffi Ufadi<ref name="GatORW" />
*Sofassu Jaradu<ref name="GatORW" />
